ItacPersonItem.Notes: Ignazio Maiorano became President of the Agitati academy in Naples. For a reference to the Agitati Academy see Ignazio Maiorano, Otii Eruditi, Novello de Bonis, Naples, 1665
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
